languages.text: "Семейство Гапрак — служители Адептус Администратум. Наша кровь не тронута псайкерской скверной".
"The Gapraks are servants of the Adeptus Administratum. Our blood is unsullied by the psyker taint."
languages.original_text: "Семейство Гапрак — служители Адептус Администратум. Наша кровь не тронута псайкерской скверной".

traits.locale_text: "The Gapraks are servants of the Adeptus Administratum. Our blood is unsullied by the psyker taint."
"The Gapraks are servants of the Adeptus Administratum. Our blood is unsullied by the psyker taint."

languages.text: «Los Gaprak son sirvientes del Adeptus Administratum. Nuestra sangre no está mancillada con la impureza de los psíquicos».
languages.original_text: "The Gapraks are servants of the Adeptus Administratum. Our blood is unsullied by the psyker taint."

traits.locale_text: «Los Gaprak son sirvientes del Adeptus Administratum. Nuestra sangre no está mancillada con la impureza de los psíquicos».

languages.text: “贾帕克家族效命于帝国内政部。我们的血脉没有沾染灵能者的污秽。”
languages.original_text: "The Gapraks are servants of the Adeptus Administratum. Our blood is unsullied by the psyker taint."

traits.locale_text: “贾帕克家族效命于帝国内政部。我们的血脉没有沾染灵能者的污秽。”

languages.text: « Les Gaprak sont au service de l'Adeptus Administratum. Notre sang n'est pas corrompu par la souillure des psykers. »
languages.original_text: "The Gapraks are servants of the Adeptus Administratum. Our blood is unsullied by the psyker taint."

traits.locale_text: « Les Gaprak sont au service de l'Adeptus Administratum. Notre sang n'est pas corrompu par la souillure des psykers. »

languages.text: "Gapraklar, Adeptus Administratum'un hizmetkârıdır. Kanımız ruhsezer lekesiyle kirlenmemiştir."
languages.original_text: "The Gapraks are servants of the Adeptus Administratum. Our blood is unsullied by the psyker taint."

traits.locale_text: "Gapraklar, Adeptus Administratum'un hizmetkârıdır. Kanımız ruhsezer lekesiyle kirlenmemiştir."

languages.text: "Die Gapraks sind Diener des Adeptus Administratum. Unser Blut ist vom Makel der Psioniker unbefleckt."
languages.original_text: "The Gapraks are servants of the Adeptus Administratum. Our blood is unsullied by the psyker taint."

traits.locale_text: "Die Gapraks sind Diener des Adeptus Administratum. Unser Blut ist vom Makel der Psioniker unbefleckt."

languages.text: 「ギャプラクスはアデプタ・ミニストラムのしもべだ。我らの血はサイキックの汚染を受けない。」
languages.original_text: "The Gapraks are servants of the Adeptus Administratum. Our blood is unsullied by the psyker taint."

traits.locale_text: 「ギャプラクスはアデプタ・ミニストラムのしもべだ。我らの血はサイキックの汚染を受けない。」
